designer.name: Skipily order webhook
designer.notes: On import you'll be asked to create a webhook ('Add' -> name: Skipily orders). Copy the shown URL and enter it in the Skipily provider portal under Settings -> Integrations -> 'Webhook URL for orders' (or send it to support@skipily.app). AFTER this module attach the 'create order' module of your system (WooCommerce/Shopify 'Create an Order' or Odoo 'Create a Record' with model sale.order).
